title: epipactis × breinerorum
intro: Epipactis × breinerorum is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis palustris. It is used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. Epipactis × breinerorum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety may vary depending on the individual and the specific preparation method.
